rt_distribution.no_canonical_range_reason: No meta-analysis or consensus review reports ex-Gaussian (mu/sigma/tau) parameter ranges for working-memory tasks as a class. RT-shape work in this literature is dominated by primary studies tied to specific paradigms (n-back, Sternberg, change detection) rather than aggregated review-level norms.

between_subject_sd.no_canonical_range_reason: No meta-analytic review reports between-subject SDs of ex-Gaussian RT parameters for working-memory tasks. Reviews summarize accuracy/capacity variability, not RT-shape variability.

lag1_autocorr.no_canonical_range_reason: Trial-to-trial RT autocorrelation in working-memory tasks has not been characterized in any meta-analysis or review specific to this class.

post_error_slowing.no_canonical_range_reason: Post-error slowing reviews (e.g., Danielmeier & Ullsperger 2011) focus on conflict and choice-RT paradigms; no review reports a canonical PES magnitude for working-memory paradigms specifically.
